name: CloudStep Running Shoes
description: Lightweight running shoes with memory foam insole and breathable mesh upper. Great for daily runs and gym workouts.

name: HydroFlask Water Bottle 1L
description: Insulated stainless steel water bottle. Keeps water cold for 24 hours and hot for 12 hours. BPA-free.

name: ProGrip Resistance Bands Set
description: Set of 5 resistance bands in varying strengths. Perfect for home workouts, stretching, and physiotherapy.

name: AeroKnit Sports T-Shirt
description: Moisture-wicking sports t-shirt with 4-way stretch fabric. Anti-odor technology. Available in 6 colors.

name: FoamRoller Pro 60cm
description: High-density foam roller for muscle recovery and deep tissue massage. Textured surface for trigger point relief.

name: ZenYoga Mat 6mm
description: Eco-friendly TPE yoga mat with alignment lines. Non-slip surface, carry strap included.

name: PowerPulse Protein Shaker
description: Leak-proof protein shaker with mixing ball. 700ml capacity. Dishwasher safe.

name: TrailBlazer Hiking Backpack 30L
description: Waterproof 30L hiking backpack with ergonomic back support, hydration sleeve, and 8 compartments.
